languages.text: "Мой меч?! Я сдержу ярость лишь потому, что такую весть лучше услышать до битвы. Прочь!"

traits.locale_text: "Мой меч?! Я сдержу ярость лишь потому, что такую весть лучше услышать до битвы. Прочь!"

languages.text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"
languages.original_text: "Мой меч?! Я сдержу ярость лишь потому, что такую весть лучше услышать до битвы. Прочь!"

traits.locale_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"
"My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"
"My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

languages.text: "Mein Schwert? Ich zügle meinen Zorn nur, weil es besser ist, eine solche Nachricht vor der Schlacht zu erhalten. Hinfort mit Euch!"
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: "Mein Schwert? Ich zügle meinen Zorn nur, weil es besser ist, eine solche Nachricht vor der Schlacht zu erhalten. Hinfort mit Euch!"

languages.text: “我的剑？战前得知这种消息总比战后得知强。这次就放过你了，快滚！”
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: “我的剑？战前得知这种消息总比战后得知强。这次就放过你了，快滚！”

languages.text: « Mon épée ? Je réfrénerai mon courroux, mais seulement parce qu'il vaut mieux entendre de telles nouvelles avant la bataille. Disparaissez ! »
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: « Mon épée ? Je réfrénerai mon courroux, mais seulement parce qu'il vaut mieux entendre de telles nouvelles avant la bataille. Disparaissez ! »

languages.text: «¿Mi espada? Contendré mi ira, pero solo porque el mejor momento para recibir tal noticia es justo antes de la batalla. ¡Desaparece de mi vista!».
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Mi espada? Contendré mi ira, pero solo porque el mejor momento para recibir tal noticia es justo antes de la batalla. ¡Desaparece de mi vista!».

languages.text: "Kılıcım mı? Bu tür haberlerin savaştan önce duyulması daha iyi olduğu için öfkemi bastıracağım. Defol!"
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: "Kılıcım mı? Bu tür haberlerin savaştan önce duyulması daha iyi olduğu için öfkemi bastıracağım. Defol!"

languages.text: 「私の剣？戦いの前にこのような知らせを聞くのは良いことだが、怒りを抑えることはできない。去れ！」
languages.original_text: "My sword? I will restrain my wrath only because such news is better heard before the battle. Away with you!"

traits.locale_text: 「私の剣？戦いの前にこのような知らせを聞くのは良いことだが、怒りを抑えることはできない。去れ！」
